title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 82.516 - City treasurer, additional compensation
text:
82.516.  City treasurer, additional compensation. — For such services as supervisor of parking meters, the city treasurer may receive the sum of sixteen thousand dollars per year from the parking fund, as approved by the parking commission.
(L. 1951 p. 347 § 4, A.L. 1955 p. 306, A.L. 1994 S.B. 567)
